bead.title: Stage 2.5: Query resolver — commits with Relay cursor connection
bead.description: Implement Query resolver for `commits` with cursor pagination. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_commits.go. Wire to existing project commits handler. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #18.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test verifies cursor pagination. (2) MANUAL: GraphiQL query returns real git log output for the current project, paginates via cursor correctly.
